title: CookbookForge
concept: An open book (two pages meeting at a central 0.5-unit spine gap) with a four-pointed forge spark rising from the spine — 'forging' source material into multi-format cookbooks (LaTeX/PDF/EPUB/Nextra).
notes: Monochrome master; brand-color (#D97706 amber) variant in color/ and color-png/. PNGs rendered via Pillow (cairo unavailable at build time).
